meaning: n.巴干达人(指居住在乌干达的布干达地区、说班图语的黑人)
examples: The fracture is growing in significance as elections are only 18 months away and the Baganda people are the most valuable voting block in the country.
The largest tribe, the Baganda, rallied in a vast throng in January to demand greater autonomy.
Although many support the idea of greater regional autonomy, they also fear Baganda dominance.
If he were to grant the Baganda the federalism they want, it would win him warm support from at least a quarter of the population.
